blockers: The investor summary described only one active model position although the authoritative portfolio contained VWCE, EUNA and SXR8.
The allocation map described VWCE capacity as unverified and EUNA as not funded although both were funded model positions.
The opportunity radar labelled funded VWCE, EUNA and SXR8 lanes as operationally mature but not funded.
Broker-availability wording remained in model-investability and next-action copy after broker-neutral authority had been adopted.
Next-run actions still instructed the operator to verify VWCE and repair aggregate-bond identity even though those gates had already closed.
The funded-position table did not visibly include the pricing date for each position.
notes: A green machine gate did not constitute visual or semantic acceptance.
Renderer, validator and regression tests were repaired before the superseding preview was queued.
